testcase.name: Scenario: Add an item to the list: tests/features/todo.feature:2:3
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Add an item to the list ✔ Given an empty todo list ✔ When I add "buy milk" ✔ Then the list contains 1 items

testcase.name: Scenario: Adding one item yields two items: tests/features/todo.feature:7:3

failure.message: Step panicked. Captured output: assertion `left == right` failed left: 1 right: 2

testcase.system-out: Scenario: Adding one item yields two items ✔ Given an empty todo list ✔ When I add "buy milk" ✘ Then the list contains 2 items Step failed: Defined: tests/features/todo.feature:10:5 Matched: tests/todo.rs:20:1 Step panicked. Captured output: assertion `left == right` failed left: 1 right: 2

testcase.name: Scenario: Remove an item from the list: tests/features/todo.feature:12:3
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Remove an item from the list ✔ Given an empty todo list ? When I remove "buy milk" Step skipped: tests/features/todo.feature:14:5
